name: causet-sdks
description: Official Causet client SDKs — JavaScript, Python, Go, Java, PHP

scripts.build: npm run build -w @causet/sdk-core && npm run build -w @causet/sdk && npm run build -w @causet/sdk-node && npm run build -w @causet/sdk-next
scripts.test: npm run test -w @causet/sdk-core && npm run test -w @causet/sdk && npm run test -w @causet/sdk-node && npm run test -w @causet/sdk-next
scripts.publish:dry-run: npm run build && npm publish -w @causet/sdk-core --dry-run --access public && npm publish -w @causet/sdk --dry-run --access public && npm publish -w @causet/sdk-node --dry-run --access public && npm publish -w @causet/sdk-next --dry-run --access public
